species: the first data set we examined was a set of in gel digests from S. cerevisiae prepared in our laboratory
tissue: One interesting example was found in data set 5 from human brain tissue
cell_type: we also found acetylated peptides from trypsin in a human epithelial cell data set
disease_state: we next assessed the influence of the different search parameters on peptide spectrum matches (PSMs), peptide scores, and protein scores using five raw files from a human breast-cancer data set
sample_source: we also found acetylated peptides from trypsin in a human epithelial cell data set
cell_line: Data set 2: Phosphorylation sites of Numb (human cell line) with mouse recombinant protein Numb
